description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image. Add a single job named build that runs in the default stage and executes the following shell commands: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY, docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA -f Docker/Dockerfile ., and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA. The job does not define any caches, artifacts, or services. It runs on all branches and pushes the built image to the GitLab Container Registry.
